Title: Coastal Window Print Throw Pillow - Nautical Beach Decor
Description:
Capture the serene beauty of a coastal window with this elegant throw pillow. Featuring a charming watercolor-style depiction of an airy, sunlit bay window overlooking a calm, blue expanse, this piece brings the peaceful feeling of a seaside getaway into your home.

The soft, muted tones and classic architectural design evoke a timeless, nautical aesthetic, making it a perfect accent for any coastal, farmhouse, or transitional decor style.

Key Features & Benefits:

  • Coastal Charm: The detailed window print creates a focal point that suggests tranquility and light.
  • Versatile Decor: Perfect for sofa back cushions, bed accents, or even reading nook seating.
  • Quality Feel: Designed to add a touch of sophisticated, breezy elegance to your living space.

Whether you are decorating a beach house, a master bedroom, or a sunroom, this pillow serves as a beautiful conversation piece and a lovely gift for those who love the ocean.
